Monster Rules.Stat Blocks: A monster’s statistics provide the essential information that you need to run the monster.
Monster Rules.Type: A monster’s type (Aberration, Beast, Undead, etc.) speaks to its fundamental nature and affects how spells interact with it.
Monster Rules.Alignment: A monster’s alignment clue to its disposition. Many low-intelligence creatures are 'Unaligned'.
Monster Rules.Armor Class: Takes into account armor, shields, and Dexterity. Natural armor is noted in parentheses.
Monster Rules.Hit Points: Determined by size and Constitution. Shown as average and die expression.
Monster Rules.Challenge Rating: Indicates the threat level. Defeating monsters awards Experience Points (XP).
Monster Rules.Legendary Actions: Legendary creatures can take special actions at the end of another creature's turn.

Aboleth.Actions:
• Multiattack: Three tentacle attacks.
• Tentacle: +9 to hit, 12 dmg + disease.
• Tail: +9 to hit, 15 dmg.
• Enslave (3/Day): Wisdom save or charmed.
Aboleth.Legendary Actions: Detect, Tail Swipe, Psychic Drain (2 Actions)

Adult Black Dragon.Actions:
• Multiattack: Frightful Presence and 3 attacks (Bite, 2 Claws).
• Acid Breath (Recharge 5–6): 54 (12d8) acid damage.
Adult Black Dragon.Legendary Actions: Detect, Tail Attack, Wing Attack (2 Actions)

Mimic.Actions:
• Pseudopod: +5 to hit, 7 dmg + Adhesive.
• Bite: +5 to hit, 7 dmg + 4 acid dmg.

Zombie.Traits: Undead Fortitude: Chance to drop to 1 HP instead of 0.

Tarrasque.Traits: Legendary Resistance (3/Day), Magic Resistance, Reflective Carapace, Siege Monster
Tarrasque.Actions:
• Multiattack: 5 attacks (Bite, 2 Claws, Horns, Tail) or Swallow.
• Frightful Presence: DC 17 Wisdom save.
